A '''Blue Dwarf''' was a drink served at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The alien [[Bezzem]] was known to drink them.

{{Food-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
A [[Wikipedia:Blue dwarf|blue dwarf]] is also a dim, but hot star in the galaxy.

*{{GalaxyCite|3|Tales from Mos Eisley: Mostly Automatic}} {{1st}}
